channel.title: Multiplayer on FantasyMaps
channel.description: Recent content in Multiplayer on FantasyMaps

item.title: OFM Shared World
item.description:
A FoundryVTT module that lets one table see, live, what other tables are doing across the same fantasy world. Foreign players render as lightweight canvas sprites — no tokens are spawned, no database is written to, no permissions need wrangling. The first concrete piece of the long shared-world vision.

It connects to a geomqtt broker over MQTT, subscribes to the tiles your viewport is showing, and draws whatever moves through them. Compatible with Foundry v11–v13.

item.title: OFM Blastzone
item.description:
A maintained fork of the original Blastzone module for FoundryVTT, brought up to v11–v13 and integrated with the shared-world stack. Drop a measured template — circle, cone, ray, or rectangle — and the walls inside it become rubble.

Run it alongside OFM Shared World and the destruction propagates to every connected table in real time. No more cross-Discord arguments about whether the wall is still there.

  • Repository
